mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.name AS class_name FROM sys_student s LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON s.class_id = c.id
SELECT s.*, c.name AS class_name FROM sys_student s LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT s.*, c.name AS class_name FROM sys_student s LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.class_id = #{classId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_student (name, student_id, class_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{studentId}, #{classId}, NOW(), NOW())
